product_id.description: The (required) product ID of the item.

variant_id.description: The (optional) variant ID of the item.

options.description: The optional product option configuration for which this price was generated.

option_id.description: The ID of the variant option or modifier option configured for this price.

value_id.description: The selected value ID for the configured option.

as_entered.description: The price provided by the merchant as entered in their catalog/price list; may include or exclude tax.

entered_inclusive.description: Determines whether the `as_entered` price is inclusive or exclusive of tax, based on the stores tax jurisdiction.

tax_exclusive.description: The estimated tax exclusive price for this product based on the provided customer group.

tax_inclusive.description: The estimated tax inclusive price for this product based on the provided customer group.

retail_price.description: The (optional) RRP/retail price configured for this product.
